message:
feat: add sidebar task list with polling hook

- Create useTaskList hook that polls /api/tasks every 5s when active
- Create SidebarTaskList component with status icons and styling
- Add SidebarTaskList.module.css matching AgentTree conventions
- Wire task list into Sidebar below AgentTree
- Add gap spacing between sidebar sections
- Connect useTaskList in App.tsx, active when session is running
- Add tests for SidebarTaskList component
- Update existing sidebar tests for new tasks prop
